ns0:entry.ns0:title: DavidXanatos/TaskExplorer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DavidXanatos/TaskExplorer
Language: c
Power full Task Manager

ns0:entry.ns0:title: DeusData/codebase-memory-mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DeusData/codebase-memory-mcp
Language: c
High-performance code intelligence MCP server. Indexes codebases into a persistent knowledge graph — average repo in milliseconds. 155 languages, sub-ms queries, 99% fewer tokens. Single static binary, zero dependencies.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: FreeRTOS/FreeRTOS-Kernel
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/FreeRTOS/FreeRTOS-Kernel
Language: c
FreeRTOS kernel files only, submoduled into https://github.com/FreeRTOS/FreeRTOS and various other repos.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Genymobile/scrcpy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Genymobile/scrcpy
Language: c
Display and control your Android device

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Mbed-TLS/mbedtls
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Mbed-TLS/mbedtls
Language: c
An open source, portable, easy to use, readable and flexible TLS library, and reference implementation of the PSA Cryptography API. Releases are on a varying cadence, typically around 3 - 6 months between releases.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: aircrack-ng/aircrack-ng
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/aircrack-ng/aircrack-ng
Language: c
WiFi security auditing tools suite

ns0:entry.ns0:title: andreknieriem/headunit-revived
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/andreknieriem/headunit-revived
Language: c
Headunit App for displaying Android Auto

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cactus-compute/cactus
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cactus-compute/cactus
Language: c
Low-latency AI engine for mobile devices & wearables

ns0:entry.ns0:title: curl/curl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/curl/curl
Language: c
A command line tool and library for transferring data with URL syntax, supporting DICT, FILE, FTP, FTPS, GOPHER, GOPHERS, HTTP, HTTPS, IMAP, IMAPS, LDAP, LDAPS, MQTT, MQTTS, POP3, POP3S, RTSP, SCP, SFTP, SMB, SMBS, SMTP, SMTPS, TELNET, TFTP, WS and WSS. libcurl offers a myriad of powerful features

ns0:entry.ns0:title: eclipse-mosquitto/mosquitto
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/eclipse-mosquitto/mosquitto
Language: c
Eclipse Mosquitto - An open source MQTT broker

ns0:entry.ns0:title: facebook/zstd
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/facebook/zstd
Language: c
Zstandard - Fast real-time compression algorithm

ns0:entry.ns0:title: freebsd/freebsd-src
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-src
Language: c
The FreeBSD src tree publish-only repository. Experimenting with 'simple' pull requests....

ns0:entry.ns0:title: lvgl/lvgl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/lvgl/lvgl
Language: c
Embedded graphics library to create beautiful UIs for any MCU, MPU and display type.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: micropython/micropython
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/micropython/micropython
Language: c
MicroPython - a lean and efficient Python implementation for microcontrollers and constrained systems

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/mimalloc
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/mimalloc
Language: c
mimalloc is a compact general purpose allocator with excellent performance.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mit-pdos/xv6-riscv
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mit-pdos/xv6-riscv
Language: c
Xv6 for RISC-V

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nanopb/nanopb
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nanopb/nanopb
Language: c
Protocol Buffers with small code size

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nginx/nginx
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nginx/nginx
Language: c
The official NGINX Open Source repository.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: opa334/Dopamine
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/opa334/Dopamine
Language: c
Dopamine is a semi-untethered jailbreak for iOS 15 and 16

ns0:entry.ns0:title: yugabyte/yugabyte-db
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/yugabyte/yugabyte-db
Language: c
YugabyteDB - the cloud native distributed SQL database for mission-critical applications.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: zephyrproject-rtos/zephyr
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/zephyrproject-rtos/zephyr
Language: c
Primary Git Repository for the Zephyr Project. Zephyr is a new generation, scalable, optimized, secure RTOS for multiple hardware architectures.
